milestone.title: Public directory experience
verify: Local preview check of landing.html and vendor.html
milestone.section_text:
## M08 Public directory experience
Status: `not_started`

Objective:
Render a static listing page and vendor profile page from exported data.

Acceptance criteria:
- Listing page renders real dataset rows
- Vendor detail page resolves a vendor from the exported dataset
- Filter and browse behavior works without a frontend framework

Verification:
- `.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_directory_dataset.py`
- Local preview check of `landing.html` and `vendor.html`

checklist: Check artifact existence and runtime/manual checks
State whether manual checks are still pending
Record pass/fail with a concrete note
notes: This runner generates structured local packets and does not call external AI services.
